title: Barricades Collapsed, No Space To Even Breathe: Survivors Reveal Chilling Moments Before Nalanda Stampede
description: A stampede at Maa Sheetla Mandir in Nalanda during Mahavir Jayanti claimed at least eight lives, most of them women, and left several injured. Survivors described chaotic scenes, fainting devotees, and late ambulances. Compensation has been announced by the Bihar Chief Minister and Prime Minister, but the incident echoes past temple stampedes in India, h
